title: Inventing ELIZA - How the First Chatbot Shaped the Future of AI
description:
The book "Inventing ELIZA - How the First Chatbot Shaped the Future of AI".  It is Open Access so the link to the PDF is here
The book has a companion site - I was monitoring this since I first heard the episode on CoRecursive.
